subject: Extract actual feature matrix dimensions and definitions
description: Run preprocessing_csd.py and load the output csd_feature_matrix.parquet. Verify: (a) Shape = 62 brands × 43 periods × 24 features (or actual dimensions). (b) Column names and types (lags, rolling means, seasonal indicators, trend, etc.). (c) No NaN values after engineering. (d) Feature scaling applied? Output: feature_matrix_spec.md with {columns: [names], dtypes: [types], shape: [...], sample_data: [...]}
activeForm: Extracting feature matrix dimensions and definitions
